item.framing: Centered item icon, slightly angled for depth. Object fills 80% of frame. No hand holding it. No text.

monster.framing: Full body, centered, facing left toward player. Dynamic pose. No background elements.

character.framing: Upper body portrait, 3/4 view facing right. Heroic pose. Character fills 70-80% of the frame. Expressive face visible.

ui.framing: Flat UI element design. Clean edges suitable for 9-slice or tiling. Dark fantasy bronze and gold tones.

splash.framing: Dramatic establishing or title composition. Atmospheric dark fantasy. No UI text or watermarks.
